meaning: n.钩针编织品,钩边v.用钩针编织
examples: Turn yourself into a breezy goddess by opting for the braided, crochet or beaded headband models.
She offered to teach me to crochet.
Learn how to use specialty yarn to crochet a beanie in this free video.
Crafters and knitters get together and crochet pieces of art to cover public furniture or sculpture.
My mom taught me how to crochet when I was about 20.
